specs.section_path: 15-Layer Summary Table > 4.4 The Cosmic Compass: The Ethical Functional and the Consilium > The Ethical Functional > L15 Reformulation: The SEC Objective Functional (Decision-Theoretic Form) (revision 11.00) > Principle (teleology as optimisation).
source_formulae: P0R04002: Axiom 3 (operational form): argmaxJSEC[].\textbf{Axiom 3 (operational form):}\qquad \pi^{\star}\in\arg\max_{\pi} J_{\mathrm{SEC}}[\pi].Axiom 3 (operational form):argmaxJSEC[].

P0R04003: Thus the maximisation of SEC is the decision-theoretic realisation of the teleological imperative. Variational flavour is preserved: gradients of JSECJ_{\mathrm{SEC}}JSEC (policy-gradient, actor-critic, active-inference variants) replace Euler-Lagrange equations at L15.
P0R04004: Where convenient, one may write a continuous-time counterpart
P0R04006: or introduce a value functional

P0R04007: $V\pi(s) = E\pi\left\lbrack \sum_{}^{}t \geq 0\gamma trSEC(st,at)\mid s0 = s \right\rbrack V^{\pi}(s) = E_{\pi}\left\lbrack \sum_{t \geq 0}^{}{\gamma^{t}r_{\text{SEC}}\left( s_{t},a_{t} \right)}\mid s_{0} = s \right\rbrack V\pi(s) = E\pi\left\lbrack \sum_{}^{}t \geq 0\gamma trSEC(st,at)\mid s0 = s \right\rbrack$
